problem_summary: Ordinary diary capture always cleans, classifies, and checks continuity, but it does not automatically compare the entry with active goals or preserve concise goal-related feedback for the weekly review. Requiring a separate goal-link interaction after every entry is easy to forget and makes the workflow feel fragmented.
impact: Relevant progress, blockers, and reflections may be omitted from weekly goal summaries even when the diary entry contains clear evidence. The user also misses timely feedback unless they explicitly ask for goal comparison after capture.
proposed_diff: 1. Keep the cleaner contract unchanged and add an automatic goal-interpretation stage after cleaning/classification and before the merged preview. Retrieve only locally relevant Active goals using deterministic filtering and the existing bounded goal context; skip semantic goal analysis when there are no relevant goals. 2. Define a compact goal_interpretations payload with goal_id, goal_title snapshot, relation(progress|blocker|reflection|related), exact or faithful entry evidence, concise interpretation, concise feedback, and confidence. Require evidence from the current entry, forbid goal creation/status changes, and label every item as AI interpretation rather than user-authored fact. 3. Extend save-preview with an optional --goal-interpretations JSON argument. Validate goal IDs, Active status, relation, evidence, confidence bounds, and compact field lengths. Allow the user to correct or remove any interpretation in the normal entry preview; do not add a second per-goal confirmation step. 4. Add an additive entry_goal_interpretations SQLite table linked to entries and goals. Persist preview interpretations only when the entry is confirmed. These records are analytical annotations confirmed as part of the entry preview, not authoritative goal_events or goal_entry_links, and must never change goal status or progress automatically. Keep explicit link_entry proposals for promotion to authoritative goal evidence. 5. Render a clearly separated 'AI goal interpretation' appendix after the user-authored cleaned narrative and theme sections in confirmed cleaned Markdown. Never insert interpretation into clean_text or the verbatim original. Include an AI-generated/evidence-based caveat and omit the appendix when there is no relevant match. 6. Extend weekly-context to return confirmed goal interpretations for the review period, grouped with their active goal and source entry. Weekly summaries may use them as inferred progress/blocker/reflection evidence, must distinguish them from explicit goal links, and must not silently promote them or mutate goals. 7. Update SKILL.md, agent-protocol.md, storage-schema.md, README.md, CLI help, and repository tests to describe the automatic stage, one-preview confirmation behavior, correction/removal path, inference labeling, and weekly use. 8. Preserve local-first and standard-library-first behavior. Add no API client, external model call, embeddings service, or vector database.
compatibility: Additive and backward compatible. Existing entries and previews without goal_interpretations remain valid; existing goal_entry_links and goal_events retain their authoritative meaning; originals and previously confirmed cleaned Markdown are not rewritten. Schema initialization performs an idempotent additive migration. The new interpretation stage increases automatic assistance without weakening the single entry preview/confirmation boundary.
tests: Verify capture with no active goals returns an empty goal context and stores no interpretation.
Verify a clearly relevant active goal is selected while an unrelated active goal is excluded.
Verify save-preview rejects unknown/inactive goals, invalid relations, unsupported confidence values, and malformed payloads.
Verify the user can correct or remove interpretations before confirmation.
Verify confirmation persists interpretations, renders a labeled Markdown appendix, and preserves clean_text and the verbatim original unchanged.
Verify automatic interpretations never create goal_entry_links, goal_events, or goal status changes.
Verify weekly-context returns only confirmed in-period interpretations and labels them separately from explicit goal evidence.
Verify legacy previews and confirmed entries without interpretations behave unchanged.
token_cost_change: increase: each capture with locally relevant Active goals adds a bounded goal-interpretation stage. Local relevance filtering skips the stage when no goal matches, and compact payloads plus existing token budgets limit the increase.
